Why Did I Skip Cabin Selection?
Congratulations, you found the best price available for your trip! Guarantee stateroom's are great way to save while cruising, with the opportuniy to recevice a complimentary upgrade from your cruise line. If you want to choose the location of your cabin you simply click "Change Category" and choose another rate. *Please note stateroom location will be at the discreation of your cruise line and can be assigned up to the day before sailing. Travelling with multiple cabins does not qualify your stateroom(s) to be assigned close to each other.

Size: 950 sq. ft. Sleeps 4. 1 bedroom, 2 bathroom
The Edge Villa offers a spacious 739 square feet of split-level splendor, plus one bedroom and two bathrooms—perfect for up to four guests. The unique design of the Edge Villas seamlessly blends indoor and outdoor living. With two stories of windows that look out over the terrace (featuring a three-feet-deep plunge pool and inviting lounge furniture) to the incredible ocean views Ascent, it’s an open and airy environment that truly invites the outside in, and vice versa. Edge Villas not only offer private outdoor terraces, but they also have direct access to The Retreat, an exclusive sanctuary for guests of The Retreat. Step right out to The Retreat Sundeck and The Retreat Pool and bar, or retreat to your own private oceanfront villa.
 - Two-story residence with direct access to The Retreat Sundeck
 - Large balcony with plunge pool
 - The only two-story residences in the fleet
 - Private terrace with three-foot-deep plunge pool and inviting lounge furniture
 - Floor-to-ceiling windows
 - One bedroom and two full bathrooms
 - Marble primary bathroom with whirlpool tub
 - Generous storage space
 - The Retreat Lounge: Personal escape with gourmet bites
 - The Retreat Sundeck: Exclusive outdoor resort with pool, bar, cozy lounge areas
 - Luminae at The Retreat: Private restaurant serving complimentary breakfast and dinner, plus lunch on embarkation day and sea days. Features signature dishes by Daniel Boulud
 - Unlimited Specialty Dining Package. Includes dinner each night and lunch on sea days
 - Unlimited Premium Drink Package
 - Two complimentary bottles of premium spirits or wine
 - Personalized minibar stocked daily with water, soda, and beer
 - Full in-suite breakfast, lunch, dinner service, and daily delights
 - Premium in-suite coffee set-up
 - Afternoon tea event hosted in The Retreat Lounge
 - Dedicated butler service
 - Butler Chat: Contact your butler from anywhere on board using your personal device
 - Destination Experience Specialist
 - Priority check-in when boarding the ship
 - Complimentary laundry service and unlimited pressing service
 - Priority departure and embarkation at most destinations, including those that require tendering
 - Reserved theater seating on Evening Chic nights
 - Extend Your Stay: available in select ports of call
 - Complimentary beach towel service
 - Complimentary shoeshine service
 - Complimentary use of an umbrella and binoculars
 - Welcome bottle of bubbles
 - Premium Wi-Fi package
 - Access to The Spa’s SEA Thermal Suite
 - Premium Celebrity king size Cashmere Mattress™ with exclusive Retreat bedding
 - Premium 100% cotton bath towels and bathrobes
 - Pillow menu
 - Exclusive complimentary sleepwear
 - Premium bath and body products crafted exclusively for The Retreat
 - Stateroom Automation
 - Signature friendly, personalized service with a guest to staff ratio of nearly 2:1
 - Twice daily housekeeping service (makeup and turndown)
 - Complimentary beach towel service
 - Complimentary breakfast, lunch, and dinner available in a variety of restaurants
 - Interactive flat-screen television system to view and select shore excursions, order room service, and watch movies*
 - Private safe
 - Dual voltage 110/220 AC outlets
*Additional Charges May Apply
The color scheme for the cabin is: NUTRL. The cabin contains following furniture items: CONVERTIBLE KING BED, VERANDA W/ 3-FOOT DEEP PLUNGE POOL, FLAT SCREEN INTERACTIVE TV, ACCESS RETREAT LOUNGE AND DECK, ACCESS TO LUMINAE, LIGHTING CONTROL PANEL, COMPLIMENTARY SPECIALTY DINING, MINI BAR & WINE REFRIGERATOR, TWO FULL BATHROOMS, ONE BEDROOM, PREM BAR SETUP, LAUNDRY 2X/ CRUISE, PERSONAL RETREAT HOST & CONCIERGE, TWO LEVELS WITH STAIRCASE

Pay At Property
Your payment details will be sent to the supplier who may choose to charge a deposit but the entire payment will be due when you arrive at the property (hotel)
Security: full 128-bit encryption security
This service is completely secure and uses the highest level of security holding a valid SSL Digital Certificate.
This protects your information from interception, thus ensuring a safe, secured, and trustworthy transaction.
We respect your privacy.
We will not provide or sell your personal details to anyone other than the credit card processing company and the provider of the products purchased.

Please verify the information provided again.
You're safe! we use secure transmission and protect your personal information

Hint

  • Visa, MasterCard, Discover: Last 3 digits on back of card.
    American Express: Last 4 digits in small print on the front of card.
    What's a CID?
  • No commas, dashes, apostrophes or other special characters. Please enter name as John Doe or Jane Doe. e.g. John Mc'Carthy should be entered as John McCarthy. Jane Simpson-Mc'Carthy should be entered as Jane Simpson McCarthy.
(what's a CID)
CID Number
The card identification (CID) number is a 3- or 4-digit code found on your credit card. We are requesting it as an added security precaution. It's another measure we take to ensure that your credit card is present when you place your order. If your CID number is illegible, call your credit card company.
Visa, MasterCard and Discover Cards:
The CID number is the 3-digit value printed on the signature panel on the back of Visa, MasterCard and Discover Cards immediately following the credit card account number.

Last 3 digits on back of card.

American Express Cards:
The CID number is the 4-digit, non-embossed number printed above your account number on the face of your card.

Extra 4 digits on front of card.

Credit Card Number

Important: Passport Requirements
It is your responsibility to present a valid passport and all visas and transit visas that might be required for your journey at the time of airport check-in. Transit visas are typically required for nationals of several African continent countries when changing planes in Europe, and for US citizens traveling to Belarus via Moscow (This is not a complete visa list.)
Important: Pregnancy Policy
Celebrity Cruises cannot accept guests who will have entered their 24th week of pregnancy by the beginning of, or at any time during the cruise or Cruisetour. A physician's "Fit to Travel" note is required prior to sailing, stating how far along (in weeks) your pregnancy will be at the beginning of the cruise and confirming that you are in good health and not experiencing a high-risk pregnancy.
Terms and Conditions
You must read and agree with the following in order to complete your reservation:
Our Company's Terms & Conditions
By checking this box you agree that you have read and accepted the Terms and Conditions, Cancellation Policies and Privacy policy. In addition you also confirm that you have verified that all information entered during the reservation process is accurate. You also acknowledge that this will serve as your electronic signature.

About monthly installment payment options.
This is an interest free option offered by the cruise line to setup monthly payments for your cruise. By selecting this option, you authorize the cruise line to automatically charge this same credit card per the schedule above.
Warning

Confirm Auto Pay Setup
By selecting the auto payment option, you authorize the cruise line to automatically charge this credit card used for the deposit for the remaining balance according to the payment schedule provided.
